name: io.github.tmbot12/meridian-edge
title: Meridian Edge — Prediction Market Consensus
description: Real-time prediction market consensus data for AI agents. Aggregated probabilities from multiple regulated prediction markets, updated every 10 minutes. 5 tools: consensus, opportunities, signals, markets, settlements.

environmentVariables.name: MERIDIAN_EDGE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Free API key from meridianedge.io (100 calls/day, no credit card required)
